import React from "react"; // ── EDIT THESE WITH YOUR REAL DETAILS ──────────────────────── const INFO = { whatsapp: "919999999999", // country code + number, no spaces phone: "+91 99999 99999", email: "info@kumaonsoul.com", instagram: "kumaonsoul_travels", // just the handle, no @ address: "Near Haldwani Bus Stand, Haldwani, Nainital District, Uttarakhand — 263139", }; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const waMsg = encodeURIComponent( "Hello! I'm interested in a Himalayan trek from Haldwani. Please share more details.", ); const cards = [ { icon: ( ), label: "WhatsApp", value: INFO.phone, sub: "Tap to open chat", href: `https://wa.me/${INFO.whatsapp}?text=${waMsg}`, color: "bg-green-500", hover: "hover:bg-green-600", }, { icon: ( ), label: "Email", value: INFO.email, sub: "We reply within 24 hrs", href: `mailto:${INFO.email}`, color: "bg-mountain-900", hover: "hover:bg-mountain-700", }, { icon: ( ), label: "Instagram", value: `@${INFO.instagram}`, sub: "Follow for trek updates", href: `https://instagram.com/${INFO.instagram}`, color: "bg-pink-500", hover: "hover:bg-pink-600", }, { icon: ( ), label: "Call Us", value: INFO.phone, sub: "9 AM – 7 PM IST", href: `tel:${INFO.phone.replace(/\s/g, "")}`, color: "bg-amber-500", hover: "hover:bg-amber-600", }, ]; const Contact = () => (
{/* Header */}
Reach Us

Plan Your Himalayan Journey

Drop us a message on any platform — we are always happy to help you find the right trek.

{/* Contact Cards */}
{cards.map((c) => (
{c.icon}

{c.label}

{c.value}

{c.sub}

 ))}
{/* Address + Map strip */}

Office Address

{INFO.address}

{/* Google Maps embed — paste your iframe src below */}
{/* To add your map: 1. Go to maps.google.com and search "Haldwani Bus Stand" 2. Click Share → Embed a map → copy the src URL 3. Paste it in the iframe below and remove this comment block */}

embed iframe src here
